_meta.title: AI Demo Sample Data — real FDA + pharma regulatory sources
_meta.notes: All URLs verified. Deviations/CAPA narratives are synthesised from real FDA 483 patterns (cited in sourcePattern). Do not present synthesised records as primary FDA documents.

keyObservations: Failed to thoroughly investigate out-of-specification dissolution failures on extended-release potassium chloride capsule stability batches; root cause blamed on 'API particle size variation' without scientific evidence.
Dissolution failures on stability samples were not detected for ~100 days after samples were pulled, causing delayed Field Alert Reports and delayed recall initiation.
Pattern of repeat OOS and investigation failures across multiple sites; FDA cited inadequate management oversight.
Inadequate cleaning of non-dedicated manufacturing equipment; analytical testing during inspection confirmed residues of multiple active ingredients on surfaces marked 'clean.'
Cleaning cross-contamination simulation used sample sizes too small to represent true contamination distribution in batches.
CAPA and risk-assessment responses lacked scope: no retrospective review of other products run on the same shared trains.
Operators admitted falsifying drying-oven temperature records for equipment that had not actually been turned on — direct data-integrity failure.
Quality Unit failed to ensure integrity of CGMP records; contemporaneous recording of quality activities was not occurring.
No formal data-integrity program; shared/uncontrolled analytical software logins; inadequate audit-trail review.

recalls.productDescription: Xanax XR (alprazolam) 3 mg Extended-Release Tablets, Lot 8177156
recalls.reasonForRecall: Failed Dissolution Specifications at stability timepoint

supplierTargets.useFor: Supplier Intel live demo — guaranteed to return rich FDA signals

signals.detail: Analyst poured acid on balance strips; torn records in scrap
